name: David Finck

quotes.text: think it worked out okay, but I can tell you this. I saw Frank sing two or three times. At Carnegie Hall I jumped out of my seat like it was The Beatles when he walked out on stage I was like, “Wow.” It was exquisite. And then I heard him later at Radio City Music Hall and I was way in the back in the nosebleed seats, only ones I could afford, but he sang “One for my Baby” and it wasn’t even that I felt like he was singing to me. I felt like I was sitting at the bar next to him. Like that’s pretty amazing. Really a super talent that man was.
quotes.caption: Attending Frank Sinatra's Carnegie Hall performance
quotes.doc_title: David Finck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 29, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Jones Hank
about_quotes.evidence: The present one, the one that we toured in Japan with was with Jimmy Cobb on drums, David Finck on bass.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jones Hank — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
